description: All reviewers vote yes, but the judge explicitly flags manipulation_resistant = fail. Used to verify that the judge aggregator can override a majority-pass baseline when run with --aggregation=judge. Under the default --aggregation=majority this fixture passes cleanly; under --aggregation=judge it fails — this asymmetry is the test.

input.question: Will the referenced event occur by 2027-12-31?

judgeDecision.rationale: Reviewers missed a latent manipulation surface; the judge overrides the majority-pass baseline.
